# Eligibility Calibration Fixtures

These fake/anonymized fixtures calibrate document classification eligibility.

Rules:

- No private data belongs here.
- Do not commit screenshots, PDFs, raw private text, or real document snippets.
- Do not use real broker names, real MC numbers, real customer/carrier/driver
  names, real addresses, real contacts, real rates, or real references.
- Fixtures mimic structure only.
- These examples are for deterministic eligibility tests, not production accuracy.
